name: Max Verstappen // Heating
description:
Max kept his heats strictly timed.

He had four a year. One every three months. And he timed them to the day. Ensuring they never interfered with a race weekend or sponsor event.

Christian knew. The FIA knew.

But the world didn't.

Until his heat hits at a very inopportune time...

At least the race is over.

For the one specific person I know is going to go feral... Have fun.

Also Christian is only still TP for set up sake shh.

Jos being a dick is mentioned.

Brocedes is mentioned and it's implied Nico is an Omega and Lewis is an Alpha and used Nico's designation against him in some way.

Request some bots here!

Come join the Lovelies!
creator: viridilamia
